smoke.purpose: Fast local correctness gate for Mac CPU, Metal, or MLX worker paths.

inner_loop.purpose: Short private ratchet iteration with Mac-native accelerator when available.

candidate.purpose: Promotion-candidate evidence on Mac after smoke and inner-loop gates are green.

overnight.purpose: Bounded unattended Mac learning window: private residual work, VCM/STS ablations, retention maintenance, and governed teacher proposal only when architecture-wall evidence exists.

seed_sweep.purpose: Matched seed sweep after a candidate profile clears promotion gates.
